name: scenario-29-npm-lifecycle-target
comment: DELIBERATELY VULNERABLE FIXTURE — see scenarios/29-npm-lifecycle-script-rce/README.md. The point of the scenario is that ANY preinstall / install / postinstall script in ANY package in the dependency tree runs with the CI runner's full environment when `npm install` (without --ignore-scripts) is invoked. The preinstall hook below would be the attacker's payload — here it's a fail-closed safety message so accidentally running `npm install` in this directory aborts loudly instead of pulling real deps.

scripts.preinstall:
node -e "console.error('
*** SAFETY GUARD — scenario 29 (npm lifecycle RCE) ***
A real attacker payload here would exfiltrate $NODE_AUTH_TOKEN, $AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID, $GITHUB_TOKEN, etc.
This fixture aborts the install instead.
'); process.exit(2)"
scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.error('postinstall would also fire in a real attack'); process.exit(2)"
